events.summary: v7.6 Mechanical Enforcement implementation begins. User approved all 4 sub-questions: (A) hard-block from day 1, (All) ship 1a+1b+1c+1d together, (V7.6) framework version bump, (After live) public Tier 3.3 issue. Resume from 2026-04-24 paused work — 1a+1b drafted in check-state-schema.py working tree.

1a (PHASE_TRANSITION_NO_LOG) and 1b (PHASE_TRANSITION_NO_TIMING) implemented in scripts/check-state-schema.py. Helpers added: _feature_slug_from_path, _load_committed_state, _parse_iso, _load_feature_log, _recent_phase_event. validate_file() gained enforce_transition kwarg; main() passes True only in --staged mode. 1a verified end-to-end: synthetic phase advance without log event fires the check with clear remediation message.

Phase 1 (Class B → A) complete: 4 new write-time defenses shipped — PHASE_TRANSITION_NO_LOG (1a) + PHASE_TRANSITION_NO_TIMING (1b) in check-state-schema.py; BROKEN_PR_CITATION (1c) + CASE_STUDY_MISSING_TIER_TAGS (1d) in new check-case-study-preflight.py. Pre-commit hook updated to invoke both checkers. Pipeline regression test extended from 11 to 15 assertions, all green. Phase 2-4 detailed plan archived for execution.
